name: @mirepoix/modernize
description: Mirepoix Modernize orchestrator — composes @mirepoix/understand (comprehension) + @mirepoix/port (per-module port harness) + @mirepoix/validate (equivalence testing) into a complete legacy-modernization engagement that runs entirely inside the customer's TDX/SEV-attested OpenShift TEE. Per the third-engine commercial model added to the Mirepoix Co Business Model v1.6.
_designNote: This package.json reflects the design intent. The four sub-packages (@mirepoix/understand, @mirepoix/port, @mirepoix/validate, @mirepoix/modernize) ship as siblings in the kavara-mirepoix-internal monorepo. This scaffold collapses them into one package.json for brevity; the production layout splits into packages/{understand,port,validate,modernize}.
